creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey Philip,

I noticed you forgot -N flag to that diff command, so the removal and
new files have no listed content in the patch. Can you please remedy
this?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

42.7 percent of all statistics are made up on the spot.
